## 📋 Task Specification
* **Query:** *"How can I calculate NDVI and predict crop health using Sentinel imagery?"*
* **Generated File:** [`sentinel_ndvi_analysis.py`](./sentinel_ndvi_analysis.py)
  * *Description:* Satellite Imagery & NDVI Analysis using rasterio and numpy

## 🧬 Activated Genome Sectors & Repositories
The following matching agricultural organs and repositories were used to inform this implementation:

### 1. Crop-Yield-Prediction-Using-ML (NERVOUS_SYSTEM)
* **Role:** Yield Prediction
* **Practical Application:** Predict crop yields before harvest using weather and soil data
* **Operational Method:** Clone repo, install requirements.txt, run Jupyter notebooks with your CSV data
* **Repository URL:** https://github.com/search?q=Crop+Yield+Prediction+ML

### 2. Crop-Disease-Predictor (NERVOUS_SYSTEM)
* **Role:** Symptom-Based Diagnosis
* **Practical Application:** Low-bandwidth crop disease predictor for wheat, cotton, sugarcane - no camera needed
* **Operational Method:** Flask app. Select symptoms from visual library. Get disease diagnosis + yield trend charts.
* **Repository URL:** https://github.com/search?q=Crop+Disease+Predictor+symptom

### 3. AI-Crop-Health-Monitor (NERVOUS_SYSTEM)
* **Role:** Crop Health Monitor
* **Practical Application:** Detect southern rust and corn pollination problems early with AI + weather data
* **Operational Method:** Upload field images. Auto-fill weather data. Generate CSV/PDF reports. WordPress integration.
* **Repository URL:** https://github.com/search?q=AI+Crop+Health+Monitor

### 4. pycrop-yield-prediction (NERVOUS_SYSTEM)
* **Role:** Python Yield Prediction
* **Practical Application:** Deep learning yield prediction using remote sensing time series data
* **Operational Method:** Input Sentinel-2 NDVI time series. Model predicts yield at harvest. Compare with ground truth.
* **Repository URL:** https://github.com/gabrieltseng/pycrop-yield-prediction

### 5. USDA-CropScape (PRACTICAL_FIELD)
* **Role:** Cropland Data Layer
* **Practical Application:** USDA Cropland Data Layer for annual crop mapping and land cover classification in the US
* **Operational Method:** Access CropScape. Select year and area. View crop maps. Download raster data. Analyze crop patterns.
* **Repository URL:** https://github.com/search?q=CropScape
